_comment: Copy this file to auth.json (or let install.sh do it) and fill in your credentials.
_recommended: Run `codex login` once — the proxy auto-reads ~/.codex/auth.json. No manual editing needed.
_alternative_env_var: Set ZCODE_OPENAI_SUB_TOKEN in your environment instead of writing to this file.
_token_source_priority: 1. ZCODE_OPENAI_SUB_TOKEN env var  2. ~/.codex/auth.json (Codex CLI)  3. data/auth.json (this file, manual)
_manual_extraction: If you don't want to use the Codex CLI, extract a JWT manually: open chatgpt.com in your browser → DevTools (F12) → Application → Local Storage → copy the 'codex' key value.
